reason: All plan claims verified against codebase. Changes are surgically scoped to three multiplication sites in particleField.ts plus a reactive listener. No new modules, no API changes, no dependency additions. Architectural footprint is minimal.

publicInterfaceChanges: New export `watchReducedMotion` from src/input/signals.ts — additive only, no breaking change
architecturalImpact.dataFlowChanges: Existing motionAmplitude parameter is already threaded through the render pipeline. Steps 3-5 simply multiply it into three expressions that currently omit it. No new data paths.
architecturalImpact.riskAssessment: Low. All changes are multiplicative scaling on an existing parameter (motionAmplitude) that already flows through the system. The live listener (steps 1-2) adds a matchMedia change handler — standard browser API with no side effects beyond updating an in-memory boolean.

currentStateAccuracy.mapping: Verified: mappings.ts:154-157 maps to 0.2/1.0 exactly as stated
